subtitle: Sign in to manage bookings or create an account
noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up
haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
signupSuccess: Account created! Check your email to confirm.

errors.invalid_credentials: Oops! That email/password combination doesn't match our records. Double-check and try again.
errors.email_already_exists: Looks like this email is already in use. Want to log in instead?
errors.weak_password: Your password needs to be a bit stronger. Try making it longer or adding numbers & symbols.
errors.email_not_confirmed: We sent you a confirmation email — please check your inbox (including spam/junk) and click the link to activate your account.
errors.too_many_requests: Whoa, slow down! 😅 Give it a minute and we'll be ready for another try.
errors.invalid_email: Hmm… that doesn't look like a valid email address. Could you double-check?
errors.network_error: We couldn't reach our servers right now. Please check your connection and give it another go.
errors.unknown_auth_error: Something unexpected happened on our end. Try again in a moment — or reach out to support if it keeps happening.

meta.title: Sign In / Sign Up | Campy
meta.description: Log in or create a Campy account to book your next camping trip.
